title: AI Engineer | Camden Corporate Office (Remote Position)

company_hook.phrase: Its corporate technology organization explores AI tools that can improve resident services, property

citation.supported_claim: Its corporate technology organization explores AI tools that can improve resident services, property

body_paragraphs.text: My background aligns with the practical responsibilities of this role. Built Python and scikit-learn risk models over SQL data pipelines, raising validated recall by 14% while holding the false-positive rate constant. This experience has equipped me with the skills to design and implement AI systems that align with the goals of improving property operations and resident services.
body_paragraphs.reason: Connects verified candidate evidence to the role requirements.

closing_sentence: I look forward to the opportunity to contribute to Camden Property Trust's innovative initiatives and discuss how my skills can support your goals.
